column6: I recently purchased the Urban Jungle by Safari Cabin Trolley Bag, and it has exceeded my expectations in every way. Pros: ✅ Stylish & Eye-Catching – The Urban Yellow color is vibrant and makes it easy to spot at baggage claim. It has a sleek, modern design that stands out. ✅ Sturdy & Durable – Made of hardside polycarbonate, the suitcase feels tough yet lightweight, providing excellent protection for belongings. ✅ Smooth Mobility – The 8 spinner wheels glide effortlessly, making it easy to maneuver through airports and crowded spaces. ✅ USB Charging Port – A convenient feature for keeping my phone and devices charged on the go. ✅ TSA Lock for Security – Adds peace of mind while traveling, especially for international trips. Cons: ⚠️ Limited Space for Longer Trips – Ideal for short getaways but may be small for extended vacations. ⚠️ No Built-in Power Bank – The USB port is great, but you’ll need to carry your own power bank. Final Verdict: If you're looking for a compact, stylish, and functional carry-on with great security features, this is a fantastic choice. The Urban Jungle Trolley Bag delivers on durability, convenience, and aesthetics. Highly recommended for frequent travelers! Read more

column6: Brief Overview: After a rigorous R&D of all kinds of huge trolley bags across Delsey, Safari, Samsonite (a clear out of budget segment I reckon) - this came out as a clear winner. Below are the high level Pros and Cons over the product: Pros: 1. Extremely light and sturdy as mentioned and outlined in the Product description 2. Its massive hence a lot of stuff that can go in. 3. This product would be recommended for long haul and heavy duty haulage purpose 4. The outer case is solid and very strong 5. Look wise - Solid appeal as well. 6. Mobility - All wheels movable 360* with good load carrying capacity Cons: 1. Since its hard case - there are certain challenges in fitting it into cramped spaces in a small car's boot space provided. I've always loaded it into a sedan (cabs) and drive a SUV - so never had an issue. It could be a struggle with a hatchback or small cars (very subjective) 2. The wheels have a rubber coat which wore off after 4 years and the usage has been probably 10-15 instances in 4 years. Hence a bit dicey when it comes to this metric - since it should've lasted longer (again I could be wrong here - but yes) Read more

column6: I recently purchased the American Tourister Ivy 78 Cms Large Check-in Polypropylene (PP) trolley, and I must say that I am thoroughly disappointed with its performance. Despite its promising features, this suitcase failed to meet my expectations in several key areas. First and foremost, the build quality of this trolley is subpar. The polypropylene material used feels cheap and flimsy, making me question its durability. Within just a few uses, I noticed visible scratches and scuff marks on the surface, which is unacceptable for a product that is meant to endure the rigors of travel. Furthermore, the wheels on this trolley are a major letdown. They lack smoothness and maneuverability, making it a struggle to navigate through crowded airports or uneven surfaces. The wheels frequently jammed and became stiff, adding unnecessary frustration to my travel experience. I expected better performance from a reputable brand like American Tourister. Additionally, the handle mechanism was poorly designed. It felt flimsy and had a noticeable wobble, which made it uncomfortable to pull the trolley. I had concerns about its longevity and worried that it might break during my travels. A reliable handle is essential for a check-in suitcase, and the American Tourister Ivy failed to deliver in this aspect. Lastly, the overall aesthetics of the trolley were uninspiring. The design lacked innovation and appeared outdated. For the price I paid, I expected a more stylish and modern look. It is disappointing when a product not only underperforms in terms of functionality but also fails to make a positive impression visually. In conclusion, the American Tourister Ivy 78 Cms Large Check-in Polypropylene (PP) trolley fell short of my expectations. Its poor build quality, subpar wheels, flimsy handle, and unappealing aesthetics make it difficult for me to recommend this product. I regret my purchase and would advise potential buyers to explore other options before settling for this particular suitcase Read more

column6: Six(6) bags at this price - I was skeptical about the quality. Also read some reviews of short deliveries and damaged deliveries. With that uncertainty in mind, opened the package and luckily all 6 items were there inside, nicely packed. Next was to check for any damage or quality issue and luckily, all 6 items were fine. Quality is good, looks sturdy and durable. Wheels are smooth. Handles are fine, smooth Chains and zips are a little cheapo but similar to other bags. Blue colour is very bright - may attract many. No comment on locks as I never use that flimsy locks in any bag. Duffle bags are basic, simple but useful. Like any other duffle bags, not very strong. Good for clothes but not for heavy weight. Suitcases are surprisingly very light despite looking heavy visually. Small and Medium size suitcases are slightly larger than usual size hardcase ones. Overall, at this price, six bags means each bag costing roughly Rs 1,000. No second though about value. In case you are interested, or it matters to you, these bags are made in Bangladesh! Read more

column6: I just purchased the Aristocrat Polyester Trigon Soft Side Luggage Set, and though I haven't used it yet, my initial impressions are quite positive. First Impressions: 1. Variety of sizes: The set comes with 3 trolley bags (55cm, 69cm, 79cm) and 3 duffle bags (52cm), offering plenty of options for different types of trips. Whether it's a short getaway or a long vacation, I feel prepared with this set. 2. Stylish design: The hexagonal pattern on the bags looks sleek and modern. The red color stands out beautifully, and I’m confident it’ll be easy to spot when traveling. 3. Lightweight feel: Even when empty, the bags are surprisingly light. This should help me avoid excess baggage fees, and I expect them to stay manageable even when fully packed. 4. Smooth wheels: The 4 spinner wheels on the trolley bags seem to work smoothly during my initial testing. Rolling them around at home was effortless, and I hope they perform the same way at the airport. 5. Great value for money: Considering the number of bags and their variety, the price feels like a great deal. Plus, the 5-year warranty gives me some peace of mind. Anticipation: I’m looking forward to using this set on my upcoming trip and will update my review once I’ve had the chance to test its durability and functionality. But as of now, I’m excited and optimistic! Rating: 4/5 (based on first impressions) This review expresses your enthusiasm and anticipates a follow-up after you’ve had the chance to use the luggage. I recently purchased the Aristocrat Polyester 63 cms Red Travel Duffle, and I must say it has been a fantastic addition to my travel gear. This duffle bag has proven to be a reliable and stylish companion on all my trips. One of the standout features of this duffle bag is its build quality. Made from high-quality polyester, the bag feels sturdy and durable. The material is also water-resistant, which provides an added layer of protection for my belongings during unpredictable weather conditions. With a generous capacity of 63 cms, this duffle offers ample space for packing all my essentials. Whether it's a weekend getaway or a longer vacation, I find it spacious enough to accommodate my clothes, toiletries, and other travel necessities without any difficulty. The design of the bag is both functional and attractive. The vibrant red color not only adds a touch of style but also makes it easy to spot among other luggage. Additionally, the multiple pockets and compartments help me keep my belongings organized, allowing for easy access to items during my travels. Carrying the duffle is a breeze, thanks to the well-designed handles and shoulder straps. The padded shoulder strap provides comfort during extended periods of carrying, and the handles feel strong and secure in hand. Even when the bag is fully loaded, it feels comfortable to carry around. Another aspect worth mentioning is the sturdy zipper closures. They glide smoothly, ensuring quick and hassle-free access to my belongings. I appreciate the reliability of the zippers, as they give me peace of mind that my items are safe and secure throughout the journey. Having used the Aristocrat Polyester Travel Duffle on multiple trips, I can confidently say that it has withstood the test of time. The bag shows minimal signs of wear and tear, which speaks to its excellent durability. In terms of affordability, this duffle bag offers great value for money. Considering the quality of materials used, the spacious design, and the overall durability, the price is more than justified. In conclusion, the Aristocrat Polyester 63 cms Red Travel Duffle is a good product that ticks all the right boxes for a reliable travel companion. Its sturdy build, water-resistant material, and ample storage space make it perfect for various travel needs. Whether you are a frequent traveler or just looking for a durable duffle bag for occasional trips, I highly recommend giving this one a try. It's a great investment that will serve you well for many journeys to come. Read more

column6: Positive Points: Durability: The hard-sided polypropylene material of this luggage ensures exceptional durability. It withstands bumps, scratches, and rough handling during travel, keeping your belongings safe and secure. Spaciousness: Despite its sleek design, the 24-inch (65CM) size offers ample space for packing. The expandable feature provides extra room when needed, making it perfect for longer trips or for those who tend to overpack. Smooth Mobility: The multidirectional spinner wheels glide effortlessly, allowing for smooth maneuverability through crowded airports or busy streets. The telescopic handle extends and retracts smoothly, providing comfortable handling. Stylish Design: The pastel purple color adds a touch of elegance and uniqueness to your travel ensemble. It stands out on the baggage carousel, making it easy to spot amidst a sea of generic black luggage. Security: The integrated TSA-approved combination lock provides added security and peace of mind. You can travel with confidence knowing that your belongings are protected from unauthorized access. Negative Points: Weight: While the durability of the polypropylene material is commendable, it does contribute to the overall weight of the luggage. This might be a concern for travelers aiming to adhere strictly to weight restrictions imposed by airlines. Limited Color Options: While the pastel purple color is visually appealing, some users may prefer more color options to suit their personal preferences or to coordinate with their existing luggage sets. Conclusion: The Nasher Miles Antwerp Expander Hard Sided Polypropylene Luggage in Pastel Purple, 24 Inch (65CM) is a stylish and reliable travel companion that offers durability, spaciousness, and security. Despite minor drawbacks such as weight and limited color options, its overall performance and quality make it a worthwhile investment for frequent travelers or anyone in need of a dependable check-in luggage solution. column6: The zipper on my trolley completely failed within just four months of purchase, making it impossible to close and turning the entire trip into a mess. For a so-called “reputed” brand, this is unacceptable. Any decent brand would replace the product or offer a refund under a one-year warranty, especially when the customer is staying abroad. column6: I just got this new Aristocrat suitcase and wanted to share my first impressions. I went for the large size, and it's even better in person than I expected. First off, I love the look of it. It's a dark navy blue with this cool, almost geometric texture on the hard shell. But what really makes it stand out are the bright yellow accents. They've got the yellow on the wheels and the piping around the zippers, and it just looks so sharp and modern. Plus, it's going to be so easy to spot on the luggage conveyor belt. The quality feels great, too. The shell feels tough, like it can handle getting thrown around a bit. The zippers are super smooth and don't snag at all, which is a pet peeve of mine. The wheels look solid and are the kind that spin all the way around, which is a lifesaver when you're rushing through the airport. Inside, it's just as good. The lining is a dark grey fabric with a neat honeycomb pattern. There's a zippered divider inside, which is awesome for keeping my clothes separate from shoes or other items. I also noticed you can unzip the whole lining, which is a smart design choice for getting to the frame or just cleaning it out. The handle is still wrapped up, but it looks like the standard kind you extend. The zip pulls are also nice and chunky, easy to grab. All in all, I'm really happy with this purchase. It's stylish, looks durable, and has some great features for keeping things organized. I can't wait to use it on my next trip! Read more
